title: Most "AI Trading" discussions here focus on Time Series or Text Sentiment. I’ve been experimenting with Vision-Based Trading
author: BornBad5948
selftext:
In the current market (Pumpfun), the catalyst is often an image posted by a high-profile account, not just text.

If you wait for the text description to propogate, you are late.

The Build:

I built a multimodal agent (ChronosDeck_bot on TG) that watches specific accounts.

- Trigger: New Image detected.
- Process: A lightweight Vision model scans the image for dominant subjects (e.g., "Penguin," "Dog," "Hat").
- Execution: It auto-generates a ticker based on the vision label and deploys the contract.

Real World Test:

We caught the PUNCH launch recently. The bot identified the subject and executed the deployment while manual traders were still trying to figure out what the image was.
